title: Ports and Maritime Organization of Iran (PMO) — Tariff Booklets (Southern Ports, 2024 edition)
source_org: Ports and Maritime Organization of Iran (PMO), Ministry of Roads and Urban Development
units: Iranian Rial per ton/day, per container, per GRT as applicable — described within each PDF
license_terms: PMO public publication; no explicit license stated on site
notes: TASK GOAL WAS cargo throughput / port statistics, NOT tariffs — this dataset is a partial/adjacent result, documented honestly below. pmo.ir does not resolve at all from this network (DNS NXDOMAIN); www.pmo.ir and en.pmo.ir (the actual live domain per web search) both time out on connect (curl 28, 20s timeout) — same class of unreachability as other Iranian government sites in this project. Via Wayback CDX (matchType=domain) on en.pmo.ir, found the site's live 'Statistics and performance' section structure: https://en.pmo.ir/en/statistics/annualreport lists English annual cargo-throughput reports for EVERY year 2009-2024 (labeled 'REPORT-20XX-ENGLISH-PDF'/'-EXCEL', plus two files explicitly named 'Annual Throughput By Port - 2009' and '-2010'), and https://en.pmo.ir/en/statistics/monthlyreport lists monthly reports back through at least 2024-09 (as of the 2025-08 snapshot). These listing PAGES were successfully recovered from Wayback (HTML only) and are not included here since they're not the actual data, but every individual report file behind a '/en/filepool2/download/{hash}' link was checked against the Wayback CDX index and NOT ONE of the ~20 annual-report hashes or ~20 monthly-report hashes had ever been crawled/archived as a binary (the site's file-download links are evidently not followed by Wayback's crawler, likely JS-triggered rather than plain <a href> in the live DOM, or blocked by robots.txt for that path). A domain-wide CDX search for any application/* mimetype under en.pmo.ir returned only 154 total archived resources, of which exactly 2 were filepool2/download binaries (both PDFs, confirmed via file and pdftotext) — these 2 are the SOUTHERN PORTS TARIFF BOOKLET 2024 (63 pages, full tariff schedule for port/maritime services, ships, container and non-container cargo, rail services) and a 3-page excerpt 'Table 10 - Storage charges of non-containerized cargo' from a related tariff document. Both are genuine, verified PMO documents, useful for port-cost/infrastructure-economics context, but they are NOT the cargo-throughput statistics the task targeted. The actual throughput/annual-report PDFs for 2009-2024 remain unrecovered this session — a follow-up could try: (a) requesting a fresh Wayback SPN2 capture of each filepool2 hash URL (save-page-now), (b) checking if PMO publishes the same annual throughput tables via a secondary channel (e.g. Tehran Times/Mehr News articles cite PMO figures directly, already visible in web search results during this session: 234.8m tons FY1403/2024-25, 3.08m TEU in 2024), or (c) trying a VPN/different egress IP since the connection-level timeout (not an HTTP block) suggests network-layer unreachability rather than a bot-challenge.

failures.reason: connect timeout (curl 28) — actual live domain per web search, still unreachable
listing page recovered via Wayback but none of the underlying filepool2/download file hashes were ever archived (not in CDX index)
same as above — listing recovered, files not archived
